//: 灵气动态上限的唯一数据源。基础 100 作为基准传给 enchant_val('qi_max', 100)：上限 = (100 + Σadd) × (1 + Σmultiply)，即所有 add 来源先累加到基础 100 上，再被所有 multiply 来源整体放大。这样一条「灵气上限 +20%」的功法会连基础带境界加成一起放大，符合玩家直觉。qi_max 通道见 fork 提交 feat(magic): string-keyed enchantment values。任何特性/法宝/丹药/第三方 mod 挂 custom:[{value:'qi_max',add/multiply:...}] 即自动并入，无需改本函数。/ Single source of truth for the qi cap. The base 100 is passed as the base value so the result is (100 + Σadd) × (1 + Σmultiply): every add source stacks onto the base, then every multiply source scales the whole thing — a '+20% qi cap' buff scales base and realm bonuses alike. Any source contributing to the qi_max channel is summed automatically; no need to edit this function.

灵气强度的唯一数据源,基础 100 作基准传给 enchant_val('qi_power', 100):强度 = (100 + Σadd) × (1 + Σmultiply)。灵气强度是攻击/破坏类法术威力的绝对评判标准之一（另一为属性极化），主要受境界与装备抬升——境界载体特性「炼气士」按炼气层数 add,法宝/丹药走 add 或 multiply。法术伤害公式取 immortal_path_qi_power()/100 作强度系数（基础修士=1.0,境界越高越大）,熟练度（spell level）不参与威力,只影响施法时间与成功率（见 doc/spell-design.md）。与 qi_max 同一套 fork 字符串键 enchant 通道,任何来源挂 custom:[{value:'qi_power',...}] 自动并入。/ Single source of truth for qi power, the absolute power metric for attack/destruction arts (alongside polarization). Raised by realm and gear, not by practice. Damage formulas use qi_power/100 as a multiplier; spell level affects only cast time and success. Same string-keyed enchant channel as qi_max.

火行属性极化系数,基础 1（中性,无偏向）。极化是法术的属性偏向乘数,主要来自有属性偏向的功法/装备——火行功法载体特性 add polarization_fire 抬高它,火行法术（火弹术等）伤害乘以本系数。基础 1 表示「未修火行也能放火弹,只是没有偏向加成」。八系（金木水火土冰风雷）各一条独立通道,基础全 1;冰/风/雷暂无配套功法,通道先就位、值恒为 1。enchant_val 第二参数 base=1 使无任何来源时返回 1。/ Fire-phase polarization multiplier, base 1 (neutral). The attribute-affinity multiplier for arts, sourced mainly from affinity-biased techniques/gear. Eight channels (the Five Phases plus ice/wind/lightning); ice/wind/lightning have no techniques yet but the channels are reserved at value 1.
金行属性极化系数,基础 1。详见 immortal_path_polarization_fire 注释。/ Metal-phase polarization, base 1. See the fire variant for the channel design.
木行属性极化系数,基础 1。/ Wood-phase polarization, base 1.
水行属性极化系数,基础 1。/ Water-phase polarization, base 1.
土行属性极化系数,基础 1。/ Earth-phase polarization, base 1.
冰属性极化系数,基础 1;暂无配套功法,通道预留。/ Ice polarization, base 1; reserved, no technique yet.
风属性极化系数,基础 1;暂无配套功法,通道预留。/ Wind polarization, base 1; reserved.
雷属性极化系数,基础 1;暂无配套功法,通道预留。/ Lightning polarization, base 1; reserved.

境界 spell 的「等级→所需累计总经验」公式。二次递增：exp_for(L) = 86·L·(L+1)，即第 L 层需累计 86L(L+1)（第1层172、第7层4816、第13层15652），单层增量 = 172·L 线性递增。系数 86 由「正常天赋纯打坐 100 天圆满」反推：每日约 2 轮、每轮约 4 次施法（≈1 小时）约 78 exp，每日约 156 exp，100·156≈15600≈86·13·14。「越靠后越慢」是曲线的内在属性，不靠折扣经验来源——打坐、丹药、炼化都给固定不打折 exp，高层吃丹自动只推进更少层数，丹药与节奏天然协调。必须与 immortal_path_realm_get_level 严格互为反函数（引擎成对校验，见 src/magic.cpp）。/ Realm exp-for-level: quadratic 86·L·(L+1) cumulative; per-layer cost rises linearly (172·L). Coefficient 86 reverse-engineered from 'normal aptitude, pure meditation, ~100 days to fill Qi Refining': ~2 bouts/day, each ~4 casts (~1 hour) ≈78 exp, ~156 exp/day, 100·156≈86·13·14. 'Slower when higher' is intrinsic; all exp sources grant flat undiscounted exp. Must be the strict inverse of immortal_path_realm_get_level.

境界 spell 的「累计总经验→当前等级」公式，上式的严格反函数。解 86L²+86L−E=0 取正根并下取整：L = floor( (−86 + sqrt(7396 + 344·E)) / 172 )（7396=86², 344=4·86, 172=2·86）。在 E=exp_for(L) 处恰返回 L、在 E=exp_for(L)−1 处返回 L−1（边界已校验）。改系数时务必同步本式三个常数。/ Realm get-level: strict inverse of exp_for_level. Solves 86L²+86L−E=0 for the positive root. When changing the coefficient, update all three constants here (86²=7396, 4·86=344, 2·86=172).

心神疲惫经验乘子：入参为当前心神疲惫度 _0（vitamin qi_fatigue, 0~），返回**打坐**经验乘子（1.0 → 0）。线性递减且无保底：疲惫 0 满速，疲惫 ≥80 归零。配合每次施法 +22 疲惫，连续约 4 次（≈1 小时）后疲惫达 88、第 5 次起完全不再给修为，必须停下休息（qi_fatigue 按 7 分钟/点退、约 10 小时退尽）才能再练——天然把单轮锁在约 1 小时、每日约 2 轮。只乘打坐 exp，不乘丹药/炼化。疲惫管「一气连打」的 session 节奏，与「越高越慢」（递增经验曲线承担）正交。无保底是刻意的：保底 0.2 会让疲惫满时每轮仍 +5 修为，挂机即可绕过 session 限制。/ Meditation exp multiplier from qi_fatigue: 1.0 at 0 down to 0 at >=80, NO floor — once fatigue caps, meditation yields nothing until rested (the vitamin decays over time). Applied only to meditation. A floor would let a capped-out player keep gaining by idling, defeating the session cap.
